title: Post-Breakup Conflict
html:
A bounded category for entries describing physical, legal, or escalated emotional conflict involving a former partner. Specimen: 2025 03 01 peacock bar incident (March 2025, an in-person altercation outside peacock bar that resulted in police response). Treat with discretion — the vault flags this category so the artifacts are findable without forcing them into more public-facing concept pages.

TL;DR

  • 14 inbound citations — concentrated around three relationship-end events: Jo (Aug 2023), Sam (Apr–Jul 2024), and the March 2025 peacock bar incident.
  • The category is operational, not analytical — it groups artifacts so Yahir can locate them without re-reading every relationship summary.
  • Pairs with piercing prompts (the writing-as-confrontation form Yahir uses post-breakup) and cons list relationship critique (the evaluation-mode aftermath).
  • Most entries are post-event reflections; one (2025 03 01 peacock bar incident) is a real-time event log.
  • Cross-references the Emily arc — the 2026 trip (2026 02 03 emily and i march trip) and stop observing start loving reflection are pre-conflict pre-emption.

Specimens (chronological)

  • 2019-09-09 — 2019 09 09 two parts of the same thing gone — earliest specimen (Alexandria-cluster aftermath).
  • 2023-07-26 — 2023 07 26 must cannot relationship criteria — pre-conflict criteria-writing (Jo).
  • 2023-08-02 — 2023 08 02 thoughts and things on 8123 jo breakup — Jo breakup retro.
  • 2024-04-27 — 2024 04 27 sam / 2024 04 27 sam breakup script — Sam breakup, full script-form.
  • 2024-04-30 — 2024 04 30 thoughts and things 43024 regarding sam solum — immediate post-breakup processing.
  • 2024-05-07 — 2024 05 07 things ending with sam / 2024 05 07 thoughts and things 5724 morning after sam — week-later integration.
  • 2024-07-04 / 2024-07-06 — 2024 07 04 questions / 2024 07 06 still thinking about sam — 2-month post-Sam reverberations.
  • 2025-03-01 — 2025 03 01 peacock bar incident — physical altercation, police response. The most-load-bearing specimen.
  • 2026-02-03 — 2026 02 03 emily and i march trip — pre-emptive (active relationship management).

Privacy / handling note

  • Do not name former partners unless Yahir has explicitly named them on a public-facing wiki page.
  • This concept page is a container, not a venue — the actual conflict details live in the source summaries.
  • the emily arc is named because Emily is named in current-relationship contexts; treat older references with care.

Source summaries

  • 2025 03 01 peacock bar incident — peak specimen
  • 2024 04 27 sam breakup script — full script-form
  • 2023 08 02 thoughts and things on 8123 jo breakup — Jo retro
  • 2024 05 07 thoughts and things 5724 morning after sam
  • 2024 04 30 thoughts and things 43024 regarding sam solum
  • 2024 07 06 still thinking about sam
  • 2024 04 27 sam
  • 2024 05 07 things ending with sam
  • 2023 07 26 must cannot relationship criteria
  • 2026 02 03 emily and i march trip

Connections

  • jo · sam · emily — the three named relationship arcs
  • the emily arc · piercing prompts · cons list relationship critique — adjacent concepts
  • peacock bar · austin tx — geographic context for the 2025 incident
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 (synthesis) — broader emotional through-line
